heading: Standards for underground natural gas storage facilities
label: 60141 Standards for underground natural gas storage facilities

children.heading: .—Minimum Safety Standards
children.label: a .—Minimum Safety Standards
children.text: Not later than 2 years after the date of enactment of the PIPES Act of 2016, the Secretary, in consultation with the heads of other relevant Federal agencies, shall issue minimum safety standards for underground natural gas storage facilities.
consider consensus standards for the operation, environmental protection, and integrity management of underground natural gas storage facilities;
consider the economic impacts of the regulations on individual gas customers;
ensure that the regulations do not have a significant economic impact on end users; and
consider the recommendations of the Aliso Canyon natural gas leak task force established under section 31 of the PIPES Act of 2016.

children.heading: .—Federal-State Cooperation
children.label: c .—Federal-State Cooperation
children.text: The Secretary may authorize a State authority (including a municipality) to participate in the oversight of underground natural gas storage facilities in the same manner as provided in sections 60105 and 60106.

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: 1 .—In general
children.text: Nothing in this section may be construed to affect any Federal regulation relating to gas pipeline facilities that is in effect on the day before the date of enactment of the PIPES Act of 2016.

children.label: A
children.text: to prescribe the location of an underground natural gas storage facility; or

children.label: B
children.text: to require the Secretary’s permission to construct a facility referred to in subparagraph (A).

children.heading: .—Preemption
children.label: e .—Preemption
children.text: A State authority may adopt additional or more stringent safety standards for intrastate underground natural gas storage facilities if such standards are compatible with the minimum standards prescribed under this section.

children.heading: .—Statutory Construction
children.label: f .—Statutory Construction
children.text: Nothing in this section shall be construed to affect the Secretary’s authority under this title to regulate the underground storage of gas that is not natural gas.
